ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_CDM_UDS_PT_20201214
ddt:Target.Description:
[2]Dec 14th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified some items, based on Rev5.
[1]Sep 24th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified FFD items, based on Rev4.
[N]Jul 28th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Initial creation.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: SSA active test 1(SSA lamp drive) enforcement state.param
SSA active test 1(SSA lamp drive) enforcement state.status
SSA active test 2(SSA switch lamp) enforcement state.status
SSA active test 2(SSA switch lamp) enforcement state.param
OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control

Item.Text: SSA active test 1(SSA lamp drive) enforcement state
SSA active test 2(SSA switch lamp) enforcement state

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to RoutineControl request

Item.Text: REAR SUSPENSION WITH MULTI-LAYER ENERGY ABSORBER(00h)
BLIND SPOT WARNING + CROSS TRAFIC ALERT(02h)
BLIND SPOT INTEREVNTION + CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT(04h)
BLIND SPOT WARNING + BACKUP COLLISION INTERVENTION + RR AEB(PEDESTRIAN)(06h)
BLIND SPOT INTERVENTION + BACKUP COLLISION INTERVENTION + RR AEB(PEDESTRIAN)(07h)
FR + RR SENSORS + IPA + PSM + FKP(03h)
FORWARD EMERGENCY BRAKING (CITY + INTER URBAN) + PEDESTRIAN(02h)
FORWARD EMERGENCY BRAKING + JUNCTION ASSIST + HEAD ON(04h)
NO EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(00h)
WITH EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(01h)
Electrical system S / ABS control - Initial state (control application inactive)(00h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 2(02h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 3(03h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 4(04h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control -CAN input signal abnormality detection(09h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - initial state (there is no ESA control application operation demand)(00h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - ESA control application operation demand(01h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - social equality movement estimated accuracy decline non-detection state(00h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - social equality movement estimated accuracy decline detection state(01h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - estimated accuracy decline non-detection state(00h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - estimated accuracy decline detection state(01h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - vehicle speed estimated accuracy decline non-detection state(00h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - vehicle speed estimated accuracy decline non-detection state(01h)
(TBD)There is no electronic control S/ABS control - stop judgment control cut demand(00h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - stop judgment control cut demand(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$0420_#004_bit1_Electric parking brake active request (automatic brake hold)

Item.Text: All ESA fixed current mode rings (S))(41h)
All ESA fixed current mode rings (M))(42h)
All ESA fixed current mode rings (H))(43h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0430_#004_bit5_(TBD)SSA LED2 (In hard LED3) lighting request
DataRead_$04F0_#004_bit0_SSA active test 1(SSA lamp drive) enforcement state
DataRead_$04F1_#004_bit0_SSA active test 2(SSA switch lamp) enforcement state

Item.Text: All ESA fixed current mode rings (S)(41h)
All ESA fixed current mode rings (M)(42h)
All ESA fixed current mode rings (H)(43h)
All ESA fixed current mode rings (S)(41h)
All ESA fixed current mode rings (M)(42h)
All ESA fixed current mode rings (H)(43h)
(TBD)AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation(04h)
(TBD)AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(05h)
(TBD)AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(06h)
(TBD)RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(07h)
(TBD)AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation(04h)
(TBD)AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(05h)
(TBD)AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(06h)
(TBD)RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(07h)
(TBD)AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation(04h)
(TBD)AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(05h)
(TBD)AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(06h)
(TBD)RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(07h)
